---
title: "Analyzing US Census Data"
format: html
author: Anthony Gao, Antigravity
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(tidycensus)
library(sf)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
income_tx <- get_acs(
  geography = "county",
  variables = "B19013_001",
  state = "TX",
  year = 2020,
  geometry = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
ggplot(income_tx, aes(fill = estimate)) +
  geom_sf() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(labels = scales::label_dollar()) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "Median Household Income in Texas Counties",
    fill = "Median Income",
    caption = "Source: 2016-2020 American Community Survey, US Census Bureau"
  )
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| cache: true
edu_ca <- get_acs(
  geography = "county",
  state = "CA",
  variables = c(
    "B15003_022",
    "B15003_023",
    "B15003_024",
    "B15003_025"
  ),
  summary_var = "B15003_001",
  year = 2020,
  geometry = TRUE
)
```


```{r}
edu_ca |>
  group_by(GEOID) |>
  summarize(
    percent = 100 * sum(estimate[variable != "B15003_001"]) / unique(summary_est)
  ) |>
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = percent)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", name = "% with degree") +
  labs(
    title = "Adults with a bachelor's degree or higher by county, California (2020)",
    caption = "Source: ACS 5-year estimates via tidycensus"
  ) +
  theme_void()
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
age_ca <- get_acs(
  geography = "county",
  state = "CA",
  variables = c(
    median_age = "B01002_001",
    population = "B01003_001"
  ),
  year = 2020,
  geometry = FALSE,
  show_call = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
age_ca |>
  select(GEOID, NAME, variable, estimate) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = variable,
    values_from = estimate
  ) |>
  slice_max(order_by = population, n = 15) |>
  mutate(NAME = str_remove(NAME, " County, California")) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = median_age, y = reorder(NAME, median_age))) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Median Age in California's 15 Most Populous Counties",
    x = "Median Age (years)",
    y = NULL,
    caption = "Source: 2016-2020 American Community Survey via tidycensus"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
